title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 14–17, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let me tell you something.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's my duty as a cook to feed anyone who's starving.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But the ones who're coming to attack this ship are those who've already been fed.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you better not complain when I kill them.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If someone is planning on stealing this ship,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then I'll kill that person without a second thought, even if it's you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Got that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmph. You save a person only to kill him afterward?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some guy you are.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shut up, you shitty cook.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! What do you think about him? Pretty good, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHO CARES ABOUT HIM! If we don't get out of here soon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Calm down. Our enemies are wounded pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right. And besides, I have to fight with that guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If he truly is strong, then he and I are going to butt heads eventually anyways!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Oh that's right, gin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You said you didn't know anything about the grand line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But didn't you guys go there?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What I don't know is the truth... I just can't believe it...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I just don't know if those 7 days we spent in grand line was real or just a nightmare... I'm still wrestling with it in my mind...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...he just apps- ared all of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: To think all 50 ships of the KrieG Pirate Fleet,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: were destroyed by a single man...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IMPO- SSIBLE!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: The entire KrieG pirate fleet was crushed by a single man!?

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
